code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const MessageInput=_ref=>{let{onSendMessage}=_ref;const[text,setText]=useState('');const handleSubmit=e=>{e.preventDefault();if(text.trim()){onSendMessage(text);setText('');}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,style:{display:'flex'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",value:text,onChange:e=>setText(e.target.value),style:{flexGrow:1,padding:'10px',border:'1px solid #ccc',borderRadius:'5px 0 0 5px'},placeholder:"Type your message..."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",style:{padding:'10px 15px',border:'1px solid #ccc',borderLeft:'none',backgroundColor:'#007bff',color:'white',borderRadius:'0 5px 5px 0',cursor:'pointer'},children:"Send"})]});};export default MessageInput;
